feedback_files.tests/test_context_feedback.py:
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor

from audit_event import audit_event
from request_scope import current_request_id, request_scope
from work_dispatch import submit_with_request


def test_surrounding_request_returns_after_temporary_scope():
    with request_scope("req-outer"):
        with request_scope("req-inner"):
            assert current_request_id() == "req-inner"

        assert current_request_id() == "req-outer"

    assert current_request_id() is None


def test_submitted_audit_keeps_its_request_identity():
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=1) as executor:
        with request_scope("req-200"):
            future = submit_with_request(
                executor, lambda: audit_event("exported")
            )

        assert future.result(timeout=2) == {
            "action": "exported",
            "request_id": "req-200",
        }
